features.name: DDD project scaffold
features.behavior: Repository contains a buildable Java 17 Maven multi-module DDD hexagonal architecture scaffold for the Digital Employee system.
features.evidence: 2026-05-23: `mvn clean install -DskipTests` completed with BUILD SUCCESS for all 8 modules.

features.name: Agent harness constraints
features.behavior: Repository contains startup, feature-state, architecture, verification, progress, and handoff artifacts so future agent sessions can continue without drifting.
features.evidence: 2026-05-23: `./init.sh` passed. It validated feature_list.json, checked DDD architecture boundaries, and completed `mvn clean install -DskipTests` with BUILD SUCCESS.

features.name: First digital employee capability
